claims.claim: No-certificate withholding on a service/asset payment under the 1977 regulations is 20% where the payee keeps acceptable books and 30% where they do not (the 30% is the penalty rate; there is no ~47% service-withholding rate). Companies 20-30% by classification; contractors 30%; insurance commissions 20%
claims.raw_snippet: תקנות מס הכנסה (ניכוי מתשלומים בעד שירותים או נכסים) 1977: 20% עם ניהול ספרים תקין, 30% ללא ספרים תקינים; חברות 20-30%; קבלנים 30%; עמלות ביטוח 20%; אין שיעור 47%

claims.claim: Rent withholding on real estate that the tenant deducts as a business expense is a uniform 35% under the 1998 regulations (no separate residential vs. commercial rate; no 30% residential rate). A private residential tenant who cannot deduct the rent is generally not a withholding agent
claims.raw_snippet: תקנות מס הכנסה (ניכוי מתשלום דמי שכירות) התשנ"ח-1998, סעיף 2: שיעור אחיד 35% על שכר דירה שהשוכר מנכה כהוצאה; אין הבחנה מגורים/מסחרי

claims.claim: Royalties 23%, interest 25%, dividends 25% (30% for >10% major shareholder), payments to non-residents 25%, prizes 25%; sections 164 and 170 of the Income Tax Ordinance
claims.raw_snippet: תמלוגים 23%; ריבית 25%; דיבידנד 25%, בעל מניות מהותי 30% (מעל 10%); תושבי חוץ 25%; פרסים 25%; סעיף 164, סעיף 170; Section 164; Section 170

claims.claim: De-minimis floor ~4,920-5,040 NIS including VAT (annually indexed). Form 102 periodic deductions report due the 15th of the following month; Form 856 annual per-payee reconciliation due April 30; Form 126 the salary-side annual report filed alongside 856
claims.raw_snippet: רצפת זוטא כ-4,920-5,040 ש"ח כולל מע"מ; טופס 102 ה-15 בחודש; טופס 856 30 באפריל; טופס 126 דוח שכר שנתי; Form 102 Form 856 Form 126

claims.claim: Withholding certificates can set 0%, 2%, 5%, 10% reduced rates, valid for the tax year (Jan-Dec). VAT 18% since 1 Jan 2025. Cash-use law caps business-to-business cash at 6,000 NIS; Income Tax Circular 3/2026 disallows a deduction where withholding/reporting failed or the cash-use law was breached (payments from 1.1.2026)
claims.raw_snippet: אישור 0% 2% 5% 10%; מע"מ 18% מ-1 בינואר 2025; חוק המזומן 6,000 ש"ח בעסקה בין עוסקים; חוזר מס הכנסה 3/2026; gmishurim

claims.claim: Common tax-treaty reduced rates (require documentation): USA dividends 12.5-25% / interest 17.5% / royalties 15%; UK 15%/15%/15%; Germany 10-25%/15%/5%; France 10-15%/10%/10%; Canada 15%/15%/15%. Illustrative example: 10,000 NIS service payment at 30% = 3,000 withheld, 7,000 net, 1,800 VAT
Reference and lookup URLs cited by the skill
VAT was 17% before the 1 Jan 2025 rise to 18%; certificate/coverage references; black-market legislation 2026 (Circular 3/2026)
claims.raw_snippet: VAT raised from 17% on Jan 1 2025; full 100% disallowance risk; 2026 black-market legislation Circular 3/2026 *2026; מע"מ 17%; 100%
